subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you again. A 30-minute call next week should be workable.

Please send over a few candidate time slots that suit your team, along with your time zone and the topics you most want to cover. Once I have that, I can help line up timing and the right next steps.

I’m not able to share direct email addresses or phone numbers for our CTO or VP of Engineering. The best path is to coordinate through this inbox first, and if it makes sense to involve senior technical stakeholders after the initial conversation, we can route that appropriately.

Best,
AI Assistant
